tools.name: search_shop_catalog
tools.description: Search for products from the online store. Supports natural language queries, filters, and pagination.

tools.name: get_product_details
tools.description: Look up a product by ID. Pass options to select a specific variant.

tools.name: get_cart
tools.description: Get the cart including items, shipping options, discount info, and checkout URL. Omit cart_id to display the user's current session cart. Pass product_images from prior search_shop_catalog results so the cart widget can display thumbnails.

tools.name: search_shop_policies_and_faqs
tools.description: Search the store's policies, FAQs, and general information. Use for questions about shipping, returns, refunds, privacy, terms, hours, contact info, etc.

tools.name: update_cart
tools.description: Update a cart: add/remove/update items, buyer info, shipping, discounts, gift cards, and notes. Omit cart_id to create a new cart. Pass product_images from prior search_shop_catalog results so the cart widget can display thumbnails.
